column1: # Extra words — transcribed from photos / new documents Stanley sends to Claude.
# One word per line, columns separated by a TAB. Lines starting with "#" are
# ignored. Required: hanzi and kr. The rest are optional (leave blank but keep
# the tabs if you want to set a later column). theme is auto-guessed if blank;
# meaning (the short Korean word gloss shown on flashcards/quiz) falls back to kr.
# hanzi <TAB> pinyin <TAB> kr <TAB> cn_sentence <TAB> cn_pinyin <TAB> theme <TAB> meaning
# Example row (commented out so it is NOT added — copy the format below it):

column5: Wǒ xǐ huan chī píng guǒ.
